## Containerizing an App

![Image](data:image/png;base64,)

![Image](data:image/png;base64,)

| Dockerfile anatomy   | Dockerfile anatomy                                                | Dockerfile anatomy   |
|----------------------|-------------------------------------------------------------------|----------------------|
| Instruction          | Purpose                                                           | Layer?               |
| FROM                 | Base image to build upon e.g. FROM eclipse-temurin:17-jre         | Yes base layer       |
| ARG                  | Build-time variable Not available at runtime                      | No                   |
| LABEL                | Image metadata version, maintainer; description                   | No                   |
| ENV                  | Runtime environment variable Available inside container           | Yes                  |
| WORKDIR              | Set working directory Created if it doesn't exist                 | Yes                  |
| COPY                 | Copy files from host into image Prefer over ADD for local files   | Yes                  |
| ADD                  | COPY + auto-extract tar URL fetch Use only when extraction needed | Yes                  |

![Image](data:image/png;base64,)
